description: Fisher information scalar curvature |R| for the 3D Ising model on L x L x L periodic cubic torus at beta_c

notes.method_detail: Wolff cluster algorithm with FFT-accelerated Fisher matrix computation, 1M total samples with 10-pass jackknife error estimation
notes.d_eff_definition: d_eff(L1 -> L2) = log(|R(L2)|/|R(L1)|) / log(n2/n1), where n = L^3
notes.convergence: d_eff oscillates around 1.04, converging toward predicted 1.019. At L=10: d_eff(9->10) = 1.067 +/- 0.008.
notes.compute: Computed on RTX 4090 (L=4-8) and RunPod A100 (L=9-10)
